seo.homeDesc: Learn kitesurfing and wingfoiling in Máncora, Peru. Professional coaching, equipment rental, and accommodation packages.
seo.tripsTitle: Kitesurf Trips in Peru | Máncora Kite Club
seo.tripsDesc: Discover kitesurf trips in the best spots of northern Peru. Full-day, 3-day, and 7-day packages available.

seo.classesDesc: Professional kitesurfing and wingfoiling classes for all levels in Máncora, Peru.
seo.stayTitle: Stay in Máncora | Bali Lodge Accommodation | Máncora Kite Club
seo.stayDesc: Beachfront Bali Lodge accommodation in Máncora, Peru. Private rooms, breakfast included, pool, yoga, kite & surf packages.
seo.buildTitle: Build Your Trip | Máncora Kite Club
seo.buildDesc: Customize your kitesurf trip to Máncora. Mix classes, accommodation, equipment rental, and activities into your perfect package.
seo.blogDesc: Kitesurf tips, destinations, techniques, and stories from Máncora, Peru. Learn about wingfoil, surf, and the best spots in northern Peru.
seo.faqDesc: Frequently asked questions about kitesurf classes, accommodation, trips, equipment, and booking at Máncora Kite Club.
seo.contactDesc: Get in touch with Máncora Kite Club via WhatsApp, email, or social media. We reply fast.
seo.reviewsDesc: Read reviews from kitesurfers and travelers who have experienced Máncora Kite Club. Real stories from real guests.
seo.wavesDesc: Live wave conditions, swell forecast, and wind report for Máncora, Peru. Plan your kitesurf session with real-time data.

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! 👋 I'm the AI assistant for Máncora Kite Club. How can I help you today?
chatbot.askClasses: I want to learn about classes
chatbot.selectLevel: Which level are you looking for?
chatbot.finalMessage: Perfect! Let's connect on WhatsApp so we can give you all the details and help you book. Click the button below! 🚀

stay.heroDesc: Beachfront paradise in Máncora. Private bungalows, pool, yoga and all-inclusive packages.
stay.introP1: Bali Lodge Máncora offers the perfect blend of comfort and beach vibes. Wake up to ocean views, enjoy our pool, and relax in our peaceful garden.
stay.introP2: Whether you're a solo traveler, couple, or group, we have the perfect room for you. All packages include breakfast and kite/surf equipment storage.
stay.yogaDesc: Morning yoga on the beach or our dedicated yoga deck
stay.whaleWatchingDesc: Seasonal whale watching tours from June to September
stay.scubaDivingDesc: Discover the underwater world with certified diving partners
stay.swimTurtlesDesc: Guided turtle encounters during nesting season
stay.beachfrontBungalowsDesc: Direct beach access with ocean views
stay.ratesSubtitle: All rates include breakfast and kite equipment storage
stay.galleryDesc: Explore our spaces designed for relaxation and adventure
stay.locationDesc: Located in the heart of Mancora, just 100m from the beach. Easy access to all kitesurf spots.
stay.ctaDesc: Book your perfect beach getaway. Click below to send us a message!
stay.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm interested in booking accommodation at Bali Lodge. Can you give me more info?
